final:
module ring_counter(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        q <= 4'b0001;
    end else begin
        q <= {q[2:0], q[3]};
    end
end

endmodule
